title: Events
content: Events 8th Workshop on Tools and Techniques for data analysis, June 10 – 16, 2019 7th Workshop on Tools and Techniques for data analysis, June 11 – 17, 2018 6th Workshop on Tools and Techniques for data analysis, 19th to 24th June, 2017 Photographs Gallery International Conference on Consultation & Experience Sharing on Role of Humanities & Social Sciences in Holistic Development of Future Technocrats-Looking Ahead : Programme Detail (pdf) International Conference on “Role of Humanities & Social Sciences in Holistic Development of Future Technocrats” Department of Humanities & Social Sciences organized the International Conference on “Role of Humanities & Social Sciences in Holistic Development of Future Technocrats” at JUIT Waknaghat during September 23-24, 2011. The Conference was sponsored by Jaypee Education System. 80 external delegates participated in the event. There were 37 invitees and 43 registered delegates. Nearly 95 papers were presented including 13 papers by students and HSS faculty from JUIT Waknaghat. The background of delegates varied from engineering, biotechnology, natural sciences and social sciences from India represented by IITs., BITS-Pilani, IISc, Universities, IT Industry, Government organizations, NGO, Management Institutes and overseas ranging from the United States, Spain, United Kingdom, Australia, Israel, Poland, Mauritius, Philippines, Malaysia, Nepal. IUCEE Effective Teaching Workshop Department of Humanities and Social Sciences organized the IUCEE Workshop on Effective Teaching for faculty members during June 1-6,2012 at the University. Resource person was Dr. Veena Kumar from Rutgers University, USA. The event was coordinated by Prof. Nirupama Prakash. Details are attached in the Flyer.
